rows.label: qev092406_MSG0001
rows.name:
I've been thinking about something
I read in my father's journal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0002
rows.name:
"In my fear of others altruism
became my trustiest weapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0003
rows.name:
"By forcing my kindness upon others
I tried to buy theirs in return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0004
rows.name:
"What more selfish motive could exist?
Such kindness is but a hollow shell."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0005
rows.name:
As a younger woman, I never
understood what he meant. But now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0006
rows.name: I see that he and I are the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0007
rows.name:
I fear that people I'm unkind
to will betray me. And I'd
rather vanish than be betrayed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0008
rows.name:
So what do I do now? I'd thought that
if I read his journal I'd know, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0009
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm sorry. I just... I'm so afraid
of other people. Of everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0011
rows.name:
I can't help but think they'll all turn
on me like they did to my father.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0012
rows.name:
I mean, what if Ornela was
just the first of many?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0013
rows.name:
How do I face Ada and the others when
I can't trust them not to hurt me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_JNK0010
rows.name: Assure

rows.label: qev092406_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Himeri that no one
else is going to hurt her.

rows.label: qev092406_JNK0020
rows.name: Force

rows.label: qev092406_SEL0021
rows.name:
Take Himeri by the arm
and lead her to Ada.

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0014
rows.name:
I know that in my head, but the rest
of me can't seem to believe it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0015
rows.name:
Still, I can't just go
hide in a hole, either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0016
rows.name:
All right. I guess I should try
to be brave and go see Ada, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0017
rows.name: What? N-no! Wait, please! I'm not ready![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0018
rows.name:
Come on, PLEASE let me help! I owe
her more than I can even say.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0019
rows.name:
Not as much as me. You sit
tight while I go find it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0020
rows.name:
She's been helping me out
since the day I moved to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hey, whoa! Really, you guys,
this is too many people![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0022
rows.name:
I get how you all feel, but a search
party this big is just chaos.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0023
rows.name:
Ah! Welcome back! You
find that "thing" yet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev092406_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod and give a thumbs-up.

rows.label: qev092406_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev092406_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Ada if there's a riot starting.

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0024
rows.name: Really? That's awesome![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0025
rows.name:
I called up some people Himeri helped,
and then they called MORE people, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, it kind of snowballed.
I'm glad I can call this off![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0027
rows.name:
No, I called up some people
Himeri helped, and then they
called MORE people, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0028
rows.name:
Well, it kind of snowballed. But I assume
you already found the journal, yeah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0029
rows.name:
That's great. Now I can call this
off before there really IS a riot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0030
rows.name:
You're really something, you
know that, Himeri? All these
people came running to help you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0031
rows.name:
But why? All this time,
I've just been selfishly—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0032
rows.name:
Hey, everybody! They found the
journal! Go on home, now! Git! Shoo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0033
rows.name:
So Himeri's problem is fixed?
Whew, that's a relief![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0034
rows.name:
It was killing me to see you
walk around looking all sad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0035
rows.name:
If you ever need anything
else, just say the word.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'm glad that worked out.
Mostly because I kinda
sorta...hacked into FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0037
rows.name:
Er, you won't tell, right? If my boss
hears about this, I am sooo fired.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0038
rows.name:
You were saying something about being
selfish, but these folks all disagree.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0039
rows.name:
They need you, Himeri, and so do I. So
please don't ever doubt that again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0040
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_JNK0050
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev092406_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell Himeri that she deserves
this for all her hard work.

rows.label: qev092406_JNK0060
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev092406_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask Himeri whether this
finally allays her doubts.

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0041
rows.name: So this is what I've accomplished...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0042
rows.name: Oh, I've been such a fool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0043
rows.name:
All this time I was looking
for answers, when they were
right here in front of me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0044
rows.name: Of course it does.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0045
rows.name:
How can I feel anything but
blessed in the face of all this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0046
rows.name: But I do need to be stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0047
rows.name:
I need to do more than be kind— I
need to really understand you all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092406_MSG0048
rows.name:
I'm far from perfect, but I hope
you'll all continue to be my friends.[ST:wait ]
